narrative.headline: What 2017 Chrysler Pacifica owners report most
narrative.summary: The most-reported problems on this vehicle center on the engine and powertrain, where owners describe failures to accelerate and an inability to shift into or out of park. Electrical system complaints are also frequent, with owners reporting erratic behavior from driver-assistance features such as the frontal collision warning system. Steering-area complaints round out the picture, with owners noting that certain safety assist features were unavailable on lower trim levels.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle failing to accelerate when pulling away from a stop, sometimes accompanied by a transmission-related warning displayed by the onboard computer. · 5 fire · 7 crash · 1 injured

issues.sample: I PURCHASED MY NEW VEHICLE AND INSIDE OF 2 MONTHS I HAD TWO MAJOR PROBLEMS. I WENT SHOPPING AND WHEN I ARRIVED AT MY DESTINATION AND TRIED TO PARK THE CAR WOULD NOT SHIFT INTO PARK. NO MATTER HOW LONG I WAITED OR SLOWLY OR QUICKLY I TURNED THE SHIFTING KNOB IT WOULD NOT SHIFT INT
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle refusing to shift into park, with the problem occurring even after waiting or slowly maneuvering the vehicle. · 2 fire · 5 crash · 8 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the frontal collision warning system behaving unexpectedly, in contrast to similar systems they had used in other vehicles without issue. · 3 fire · 2 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report that autonomous braking and lane-assist features are unavailable on lower trim levels and are only accessible on higher, more expensive trims. · 7 crash · 3 injured
